hero.desc: Professional grooming with a gentle touch. We treat every furry friend like family — because they are. 🐶🐱

services.label: ✨ Our Services
services.title: Everything Your Pet Needs
services.sub: From a quick bath to a full spa day — we've got your furry bestie covered.

items.title: Bath & Brush
items.desc: A thorough shampoo, conditioning treatment, blow-dry, and brush-out to leave your pet fresh and fluffy.

items.title: Full Groom
items.desc: Complete styling including bath, haircut, nail trim, ear cleaning, and a spritz of pet-safe cologne.

items.title: Nail Trim & File
items.desc: Quick and stress-free nail trimming and filing to keep your pet comfortable and your floors scratch-free.

items.title: Teeth Brushing
items.desc: Gentle teeth brushing with pet-safe toothpaste to promote oral health and freshen that puppy breath.

items.title: Spa Package
items.desc: The ultimate pampering experience — aromatherapy bath, deep conditioning mask, massage, and more.

items.title: Cat Grooming
items.desc: Specialized gentle grooming for our feline friends — de-shedding, mat removal, and coat conditioning.

how.label: 🗓️ How It Works
how.title: 3 Easy Steps to a Happy Pet
how.sub: Getting your pet groomed has never been simpler. We handle everything!

steps.title: Book Online or Call
steps.desc: Choose your service, pick a date and time that works for you, and fill in your pet's details. Takes less than 2 minutes!

steps.title: Drop Off Your Furball
steps.desc: Bring your pet to our cozy salon. We'll greet them with treats and love to make them feel right at home.

steps.title: Pick Up a Happy, Clean Pet
steps.desc: We'll text you when they're ready. Come pick up your freshly groomed, tail-wagging best friend!

reviews.label: 💬 Happy Customers
reviews.title: Tails Are Wagging!
reviews.sub: Don't just take our word for it — hear from our furry clients' humans.

items.text: "Pawfect is absolutely amazing! My golden retriever Max comes out looking like a show dog every single time. The staff is so gentle and caring — he actually gets excited to go!"
items.name: Sarah M.

items.text: "I was nervous about bringing my anxious rescue cat, but the team was incredibly patient. Luna came home relaxed and smelling like lavender. We're regulars now!"
items.name: James K.

items.text: "The spa package is worth every penny! My poodle Coco gets the full treatment and honestly looks better than me after. The online booking is super easy too."
items.name: Emily R.

booking.title: Ready for a Pawsome Makeover?
booking.sub: Fill in the form below and we'll confirm your appointment within 1 hour. First-time clients get 15% off! 🎉
booking.note: 🔒 No payment required to book. We'll confirm via text or call.
